name: grafana-metrics-extraction-tool
description: Fetch API latency metrics from Grafana/Prometheus and update a CSV file.

scripts.check: node --check config/config.js && node --check src/grafanaClient.js && node --check src/csvReader.js && node --check src/csvWriter.js && node --check src/metricsCalculator.js && node --check src/main.js
